channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8013] racer test_1: (lu_object.h:862:lu_object_attr()) ASSERTION( ((o)->lo_header->loh_attr & LOHA_EXISTS) != 0 ) failed:
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/7aff265a-f924-11e5-8f37-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_1 failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

MDS4,MDS2 console:

18:18:35:[52206.369898] LustreError: 28446:0:(lu_object.h:862:lu_object_attr()) ASSERTION( ((o)->lo_header->loh_attr & LOHA_EXISTS) != 0 ) failed: 
18:18:35:[52206.375442] LustreError: 28446:0:(lu_object.h:862:lu_object_attr()) LBUG

test log:

== racer test 1: racer on clients: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 ============ 18:11:57 (1459473117)
racers pids: 12942 12943 12944 12945 12947 12948 12949 12951
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre/racer 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre/racer2 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre2/racer 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre/racer1 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre2/racer1 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre2/racer3 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre2/racer2 
CMD: onyx-60vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com,onyx-60vm2 DURATION=900 MDSCOUNT=4 				   LFS=/usr/bin/lfs /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh /mnt/lustre/racer3 
onyx-60vm1: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 20485 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm2: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 11571 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm1: ./file_exec.sh: line 13:  4617 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm1: ./file_exec.sh: line 13:  9282 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm1: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 15244 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm2: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 27597 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm1: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 11319 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm1: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 29198 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm2: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 30064 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
onyx-60vm2: ./file_exec.sh: line 13: 22803 Segmentation fault      $DIR/$file 0.$((RANDOM % 5 + 1)) 2> /dev/null
item.environment:
EL7.2 Server/EL7.2 Client - DNE
branch: master
build: 3340

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Another instance on master.
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/9b4fea30-3a9b-11e6-80b9-5254006e85c2
